assertionResults.fullName: token.service generateToken() should return a string token
assertionResults.title: should return a string token

assertionResults.title: should embed user_id, email, role in payload

assertionResults.fullName: token.service generateToken() should set issuer and audience claims
assertionResults.title: should set issuer and audience claims

assertionResults.fullName: token.service generateToken() should set expiry (~1 hour from now)
assertionResults.title: should set expiry (~1 hour from now)

assertionResults.fullName: token.service generateToken() should accept user_id or id field
assertionResults.title: should accept user_id or id field

assertionResults.fullName: token.service generateToken() should throw if JWT_SECRET is missing
assertionResults.title: should throw if JWT_SECRET is missing

assertionResults.title: should return decoded payload for a valid token

assertionResults.title: should throw JsonWebTokenError for an invalid token

assertionResults.fullName: token.service verifyToken() should throw TokenExpiredError for an expired token
assertionResults.title: should throw TokenExpiredError for an expired token

assertionResults.fullName: token.service verifyToken() should throw for a token signed with wrong secret
assertionResults.title: should throw for a token signed with wrong secret

assertionResults.fullName: token.service verifyToken() should throw if JWT_SECRET is missing
assertionResults.title: should throw if JWT_SECRET is missing

assertionResults.fullName: token.service decodeToken() should decode without verification
assertionResults.title: should decode without verification

assertionResults.fullName: token.service decodeToken() should return null for completely invalid token
assertionResults.title: should return null for completely invalid token

assertionResults.title: should register a new user and return access_token

assertionResults.title: should throw 409 if email already exists

assertionResults.title: should throw ZodError for invalid email

assertionResults.title: should throw ZodError for short password

assertionResults.title: should default role to viewer

assertionResults.title: should cache role in Redis after registration

assertionResults.title: should return access_token for valid credentials

assertionResults.title: should throw 401 if user not found

assertionResults.title: should throw 401 if password is wrong

assertionResults.title: should throw 403 if user is inactive

assertionResults.title: should cache role in Redis on successful login
